description_long: This object depicts a stylized construction worker in a dynamic pose, with one arm extended forward and the other bent, as if engaged in a task. The figure is characterized by angular, faceted surfaces and exaggerated proportions, with elongated limbs and a prominent torso. The worker appears to be wearing a reddish-brown shirt and dark pants, with a distinct orange hard hat on the head. The hands and feet are simplified, with the right hand gripping an implied tool or object. The overall form is abstracted, with sharp edges and a low-polygon aesthetic, giving the figure a modern, digital look. The color palette is dominated by shades of red, brown, orange, and black, emphasizing the construction theme.
description: A stylized, angular construction worker figure with a reddish shirt, dark pants, and an orange hard hat, posed dynamically as if working. The form is abstract and faceted, with exaggerated limbs and simplified features.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from an upper angle, highlighting the bent left arm, orange hard hat, and the angular torso with the right leg extended backward.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the elongated right arm and leg, with the orange hard hat and the dynamic forward-reaching pose clearly visible.
description_view_2: A close-up of the upper torso and back, showing the faceted red shirt and the angular structure of the figure's body.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, focusing on the extended left leg, bent right arm, and the overall stretched posture of the figure.
